features.description: Consolidate open dependency and CI pull request changes into the master line
steps: Inspect open PR branches and determine the consolidated change set
Integrate selected dependency and workflow updates into the repo
Generate a backend lockfile and resolve install compatibility issues
Validate via npm ci, lint, tests, and smoke checks
Commit and push the consolidated branch

features.description: Review the DTS-1689 Linear duplicate status change and prepare a debug prompt for external agent follow-up
steps: Inventory available MCP resources and external service access
Review the Linear trigger payload and determine the likely root cause
Research current tool documentation before creating the prompt
Create a planned prompt for Linear/Composio follow-up
Document blocked external actions and validation status
